title: Strait of Hormuz becomes site of asymmetric naval war with uncertain outcome
subhed: Despite the military might of the US, which has sent two aircraft carriers to the region, Iran has the capability to disrupt operations with its drones and the threat of mines, which, for now, are enough to block navigation through the strategic maritime passage.

title: French far right failed to confirm local gains in mid-sized cities
subhed: Almost all the medium-sized cities where Marine Le Pen's Rassemblement National party has made significant gains since 2014 are concentrated in the north and along the Mediterranean coast.

title: Yazidi genocide trial: Sabri Essid, the 'monster' husband who became a slave owner
subhed: On Wednesday, the French jihadist's ex-wife told the court about the man he had been before he turned to jihad. In France, she was the first woman to suffer his violence and perversion. Then, in Syria, the terrorist found the ideal environment to freely unleash his desire to dominate.

title: Five takeaways from the first round of French local elections

title: Violence in restaurant kitchens exposes deep wounds in fine dining
